name: airprompter
description: Create, run, and improve AirPrompter workflows from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Create, run, and improve saved AirPrompter workflows.
interface.longDescription: AirPrompter connects Codex to saved workflow guidance. It routes workflow discovery, execution, creation, and updates through the authenticated AirPrompter MCP surface.
defaultPrompt: Run my AirPrompter workflow for this task.
Create an AirPrompter workflow for this process.
Update my workflow to handle this new step.
